guest.title: Account Dashboard
guest.lead: This section loads the user shell only when a session is authenticated. To continue, sign in or create an account.
guest.hint: No personal content or navigation is displayed while the session is not authenticated.

index.title: Dashboard
index.lead: Authenticated user home: account status, security indicators and recent events. Navigation stays in the left menu.
index.recommended_actions_hint: Small tasks to keep the account healthy.
index.purpose_hint: This page is a summary surface, not a navigation hub.
index.purpose_account_body: Shows whether the authenticated account loaded correctly and which identity data is available.
index.purpose_security_body: Summarizes email, MFA and open recovery request signals without replacing dedicated pages.
index.purpose_activity_body: Highlights the latest recovery or account-security events when they exist.
